title: Excalibur | Iron's Spells 'N Spellbooks support
description: This resource pack redraws the Iron's Spells 'N Spellbooks mod in the Excalibur style
body:
This unofficial compatibility pack ensures that the textures in the [Iron's Spells 'N Spellbooks](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks) Mod seamlessly integrate with the amazing [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack.

**This pack is WIP.** There are still many textures missing.

**Credits:**

*   Maffhew – Creator of Excalibur
*   Kevinl2000 - Has made many textures of this pack
*   Iron431 - Creator of Iron's Spells 'N Spellbooks
